caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black headphones sits before a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. His shirt features the printed text "I NEVER DO SHIT". To his left, a white mannequin is dressed in a white t-shirt. The background includes a wall of framed images and a clothing rack with various garments. On-screen logos appear in the lower corners, including one that reads "DONE" and another that says "DONE WITH THE". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking; he initially looks forward, then raises his right arm and gestures with his hand while continuing to talk. By the end of the clip, he is looking slightly downward and to the side, continuing his conversation while gesturing with his hand near the microphone.
